services.vitaminC_desc: Vitamin C infusions for energy, immune support and wellbeing.

hero.title: Special Therapies
hero.subtitle: Individual Consultation · 45 Minutes
hero.description: In a detailed consultation, we take the time to look at your dental health holistically. Together, we develop an individual treatment plan tailored to your needs and wishes.

a1.title: What can I expect?
a1.content: During your first consultation, we conduct a comprehensive examination and discuss your dental health in detail. We take the time to understand your wishes and concerns, and create a customized treatment plan. State-of-the-art diagnostics and compassionate care are at the heart of everything we do.

a2.title: How do I prepare?
a2.content: Please bring your insurance card and, if available, any recent X-rays or findings. Feel free to note down any questions or concerns you'd like to discuss beforehand. No special preparation is necessary — we take care of everything else.

a3.title: Prices & Insurance
a3.content: The costs for special therapies vary depending on the treatment. Many services are covered by private health insurance. For publicly insured patients, we are happy to provide a transparent cost estimate. Talk to us — we advise honestly and without hidden costs.

grid.title: Our Specializations
grid.subtitle: Specialized treatments for your dental health — from prevention to aesthetics.

prophylaxe.title: Prevention & Care
prophylaxe.desc: Professional dental cleaning and individual prevention programs for long-term healthy teeth.

implantologie.title: Implantology
implantologie.desc: High-quality dental implants as a permanent replacement for missing teeth — natural and durable.

aesthetik.title: Aesthetic Dentistry
aesthetik.desc: Veneers, whitening, and invisible corrections for your most beautiful smile.

parodontologie.title: Periodontology
parodontologie.desc: Treatment of gum diseases and preservation of the tooth support structure.

endodontie.title: Endodontics
endodontie.desc: Modern root canal treatments to preserve your natural teeth.

kieferorthopaedie.title: Orthodontics
kieferorthopaedie.desc: Correcting misaligned teeth — with invisible aligners or classic methods.

philosophy.title: Our Holistic Approach
philosophy.p1: At Die Drei Zahnärzte, we don't view dental health in isolation, but as part of your overall well-being. Our special therapies combine cutting-edge dentistry with a holistic understanding of health.
philosophy.p2: Every treatment plan is individually tailored to you. We take the time for thorough diagnostics, explain every step clearly, and personally accompany you through the entire treatment process.

t1.quote: The consultation was incredibly thorough. I felt comfortable right away and knew exactly what to expect.
t1.name: Sarah M.

t2.quote: Finally a practice that really takes its time. The implants look perfect and feel natural.
t2.name: Thomas K.

t3.quote: After years of dental anxiety, this was my first positive experience at a dentist.
t3.name: Lisa W.

t4.quote: Professional, empathetic, and up to date with the latest technology. Highly recommended!
t4.name: Michael R.

t5.quote: The whitening result exceeded my expectations. The team is simply amazing.
t5.name: Anna S.

s1.title: Micronutrients
s1.desc: We find out where you're lacking micronutrients and support you with the right supplements, infusions and nutritional advice so your cells can produce steady, sustainable energy.

s2.title: Holistic Diagnostics
s2.desc: Using state-of-the-art diagnostics, we analyze your dental health in the overall context of your body and identify connections that others miss.

s3.title: Regenerative Therapy
s3.desc: With regenerative procedures, we promote your body's natural healing and support the development of healthy dental and tissue structures.

s4.title: Stress Reduction
s4.desc: Chronic stress directly impacts your dental health. We help you identify stress factors and offer treatments that relax body and mind.

s5.title: Prevention & Longevity
s5.desc: Our preventive approach aims to stop problems before they arise — for lifelong healthy teeth and a strong immune system.

s6.title: Holistic Wellness
s6.desc: We combine dentistry with holistic health promotion, creating a treatment experience that brings body and soul into harmony.

s7.title: Immune Support
s7.desc: A strong immune system starts in the mouth. We strengthen your body's natural defenses through targeted therapies and support your natural resilience.

bottomCta.title: Ready for Your Personal Consultation?
bottomCta.description: Book an appointment now and get individual advice on our special therapies.
